title: Verify existing implementation of taskify context injection
description: This task validates that the taskify stage correctly injects project memory and file tree context when processing a ticket. Based on analysis of the engine implementation (referenced in task.json), the context injection mechanism IS working correctly: the engine reads `.kody/memory.md` (up to 2000 chars) and generates a file tree via `git ls-files` (up to 150 files), then injects them via `{{PROJECT_CONTEXT}}` placeholder in the `taskify-ticket.md` template. The previous pipeline failures with exit code 143 (SIGTERM) are timeout-related, not a context injection bug. The `.kody/steps/taskify.md` file uses `{{TASK_CONTEXT}}` but this is a different template (task classification mode) - the issue decomposition uses `taskify-ticket.md` which correctly uses `{{PROJECT_CONTEXT}}`.
existing_patterns: Project memory injection via `{{PROJECT_CONTEXT}}` in buildPrompt() function
Context tiers system using `injectTaskContextTiered()` for plan/build/review stages
